organizationSwitcherDescription: Quickly switch organizations to manage another workspace without going back through the sidebar.
deleteOrganizationDescription: Deleting disables the organization, removes access, revokes invitations and API keys, then anonymizes sensitive organization data.
deleteOrganizationConfirmDescription: This action is irreversible. The organization will be soft-deleted and its sensitive data will be anonymized.
deleteOrganizationTypeName: Type the organization name to confirm
noMembersDescription: Invite a member to manage their roles in this organization.
removeMemberDescription: Remove their access to this organization and strip their roles.
removeMemberConfirmDescription: The member will lose access to this organization. Their roles will be removed.
roleGivesAllProjects: This role gives access to all projects.
cannotOrphanProject: You cannot leave this project without a user.
currentUserMustKeepProject: Your account must remain attached to at least one project.
noInvitationDescription: Pending invitations from this organization will appear here.
disableInvitationDescription: The invitation sent to {{email}} will no longer be accepted.
pageBaseline: Projects, members, and invitations for the active organization.
emptyOrganizationDescription: No organization is available for this account.
noProjectManageDescription: Create a first project to populate this organization.
noProjectUserDescription: No project is available for your account.
name: Name
deleteProjectDescription: This action will delete the project and its associated data.
projectMembersDescription: Add or remove access specific to this project.
allMembersAlreadyAttached: All available members are already attached to this project.
deleteApiKeyDescription: This action is permanent. Integrations using this key will no longer be able to call the API.
